name: lab-management-platform
description: 实验室管理平台微内核插件

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/contracts plugins/hello-world plugins/inventory plugins/files plugins/collaboration plugins/ai plugins/projects apps/api && corepack pnpm --filter @lab/web build:web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/contracts plugins/hello-world plugins/inventory plugins/files plugins/collaboration plugins/ai plugins/projects apps/api --pretty false
scripts.ci: corepack pnpm format:check && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
